properties.displayName: Audit - Block adding firewall rules and Allow access from my IP on Azure cosmos DB
properties.description: Deny if Cosmos DB is configured using Allow access from my IP and block adding firewall rules on Azure cosmos DB .
nonComplianceMessages: Azure Cosmos DB network configuration does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Configuring Cosmos DB with Allow access from my IP and adding firewall rules is not permissible; only allowing access from the Azure portal is compliant with the requirements. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
